channel.title: Team on Privorum — AI, Automation & Backend Engineering
channel.description: Recent content in Team on Privorum — AI, Automation & Backend Engineering

item.title: Thomas Modeneis
item.description:
I help companies define, build, and scale technical products that require strong architecture, operational discipline, and senior engineering judgment.

With more than 20 years of experience across multiple industries, countries, and technical environments, I have worked in roles spanning founder, CTO, architect, developer, and technical advisor.

My background includes backend platforms, trading systems, blockchain products, analytics systems, distributed software, and cloud infrastructure.

You have a vision. I help turn it into a system that can actually run.

item.title: Ivens Signorini
item.description:
I am a Senior Backend Engineer with more than 18 years of experience designing, building, and maintaining high-performance systems across fintech, e-commerce, blockchain, and analytics.

I specialize in Golang, Java, and Solidity, with strong expertise in microservices architecture, CI/CD automation, and cloud deployment.

Throughout my career, I have focused on building scalable, reliable, and maintainable systems with a practical, solution-oriented approach.

I work best when the system has to hold up under real load, integrate cleanly with the rest of the stack, and stay maintainable once it’s in production.
